title: FreezeFrame
description: Simple mod that allows servers to freeze player interactions.
body:
# FreezeFrame

FreezeFrame is a simple mod that allows servers to freeze player interactions and manage PVP.

FreezeFrame is required on **both client and server.**

- `/freezeall` Freezes all player interactions.
- `/unfreezeall` Unfreezes all player interactions.
- `/freeze {player}` Freezes a specific player.
- `/unfreeze {player}` Unfreezes a specific player.
